chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6714 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on Misc. No.32482/2022 2. For hearing of Misc. No.28922/2021 3. For hearing of main case 22.05.2025 Messrs. Zain A. Jatoi and Mustafa Mumdani, advocates for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel for respondent states upon instructions that the impugned recovery notice is being withdrawn forthwith, subject to the right of the department to initiate any proceedings as may be permissible under the law. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petitioner will be satisfied with the representation so extended and seeks disposal of the petition in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
